# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  parameters:
    location: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineSizes/Standard_D2s_v3'
    osDiskType: 'Premium_LRS'
    vmNamePrefix: 'dev-vm'
    numberOfVms: 3
    publicIPPrefix: '10.0.0.0/24'

variables:
  publicIPNameFormat: '{prefix}-ip'
  nicNameFormat: '{prefix}-nic'
  nicAddressSpace: '{publicIPPrefix}/26'
  nicSubnetName: 'default'

outputs:
  vmList: []

functions:
  createPublicIp:
    type: 'function'
    resourceType: 'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses'
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    name:
      value: '{parameters.location}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/{basename}-{index}'
    properties:
      publicIPAddressVersion: 'IPv4'
      allocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
      sku:
        name: 'Standard'
        tier: 'Basic'

  createNic:
    type: 'function'
    resourceType: 'Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces'
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    name:
      value: '{parameters.location}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/{basename}-{index}'
    properties:
      location: '[parameters.location]'
      tags: {}
      resourceGroup: '[parameters.resourceGroupName]'
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: 'ipconfig1'
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
            subnet:
              id: '[variables.nicAddressSpace]/subnets/{variables.nicSubnetName}'
      dnsSettings:
        internalDnsName: 'internal-dns-suffix'
        virtualNetworkName: ''
      enableAcceleratedNetworking: false

  createVM:
    type: 'function'
    resourceType: 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines'
    apiVersion: '2019-07-01'
    name:
      value: '{parameters.location}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/{basename}-{index}'
    properties:
      location: '[parameters.location]'
      tags: {}
      resourceGroup: '[parameters.resourceGroupName]'
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: '[parameters.vmNamePrefix]s'
      osProfile:
        computerName: '{basename}-{index}'
        adminUsername: 'adminuser'
        windowsConfiguration:
          provider: 'MicrosoftWindowsServer'
          publisher: 'MicrosoftWindowsServer'
          offer: 'WindowsServer'
          sku: '2016-Datacenter'
          version: 'latest'
          administrationState: 'Enabled'
          provisionVMAgent: true
      networkProfile:
        id: '[variables.nicNameFormat]/{index}'
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: 'MicrosoftWindowsServer'
          offer: 'WindowsServer'
          sku: '2016-Datacenter'
          version: 'latest'
        osDisk:
          caching: 'ReadWrite'
          createOption: 'FromImage'
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: '[variables.osDiskType]'
      properties: {}

  createNicSubnet:
    type: 'function'
    resourceType: 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets'
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    name:
      value: '{parameters.location}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{basename}-vnet/subnets/{variables.nicSubnetName}'
    properties:
      addressPrefix: '[variables.nicAddressSpace]'

  createVNet:
    type: 'function'
    resourceType: 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks'
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    name:
      value: '{parameters.location}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{basename}-vnet'
    properties:
      location: '[parameters.location]'
      tags: {}
      resourceGroup: '[parameters.resourceGroupName]'
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes: ['[variables.nicAddressSpace]/26']
      subnets: []

  createPublicIPs:
    type: 'function'
    dependsOn: [createVNet]
    iterationCount: '[parameters.numberOfVms]'
    functionBody:
      functions:
        - name: createPublicIp
          arguments:
            prefix: '{basename}-vnet'
            index: '@index()'
      variables: {}

  createNics:
    type: 'function'
    dependsOn: [createPublicIPs]
    iterationCount: '[parameters.numberOfVms]'
    functionBody:
      functions:
        - name: createNic
          arguments:
            basename: '{basename}-vnet'
            index: '@index()'
      variables: {}

  createNicSubnets:
    type: 'function'
    dependsOn: [createVNet]
    iterationCount: '[parameters.numberOfVms]'
    functionBody:
      functions:
        - name: createNicSubnet
          arguments:
            basename: '{basename}-vnet'
            index: '@index()'
      variables: {}

  createVmList:
    type: 'function'
    dependsOn: [createNics]
    iterationCount: '[parameters.numberOfVms]'
    functionBody:
      functions:
        - name: createVM
          arguments:
            basename: '{basename}-vnet'
            index: '@index()'
      variables: {}

main:
  type: 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments'
  apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
  name:
    value: 'dev-environment'
  properties:
    mode: 'Incremental'
    templateLink:
      uri: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/create?api-version=2019-10-01'
      contentVersion: '1.0.0.0'
    parameters:
      basename:
        value: 'dev-env'
      resourceGroupName:
        value: '{resourceGroupName}'
    resources: []
  resources:
    - type: 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks'
      apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
      name:
        value: '{parameters.location}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/dev-env-vnet'
      properties: {}
    - type: 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments'
      apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
      name:
        value: 'createPublicIPs'
      properties:
        mode: 'Incremental'
        templateLink:
          uri: './createPublicIPs.json'
          contentVersion: '1.0.0.0'
        parameters: {}
    - type: 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments'
      apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
      name:
        value: 'createNicSubnets'
      properties:
        mode: 'Incremental'
        templateLink:
          uri: './createNicSubnets.json'
          contentVersion: '1.0.0.0'
        parameters: {}
    - type: 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments'
      apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
      name:
        value: 'createNics'
      properties:
        mode: 'Incremental'
        templateLink:
          uri: './createNics.json'
          contentVersion: '1.0.0.0'
        parameters: {}
    - type: 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments'
      apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
      name:
        value: 'createVmList'
      properties:
        mode: 'Incremental'
        templateLink:
          uri: './createVmList.json'
          contentVersion: '1.0.0.0'
        parameters: {}
